steps.title: Calculate the mean of data set A
Set the means equal
steps.content: The mean of data set B is $$\frac{61 + 64 + 74 + 85 + x}{5} = \frac{284 + x}{5}$$. Since both means must be equal: $$\frac{284 + x}{5} = 74$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $5$: $$284+x=370$$ Subtract $284$: $$x=86$$ In Desmos, you can enter the two means as a single equation and solve the missing value directly. That matches choice C, so C is correct.
